Dialog.name: MND_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maybe I should ask about the rumors[n]of the {f 0 1 2}taiyaki{f 0 1 27} I read on the website...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22506 0 0}{f 5 21 1 100}Oh, taiyaki? It's our long-awaited new product that's getting rave reviews![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}I got so many requests from students that I started bringing them in every day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}And you know what, it's a big hit... Sorry, I'm starting to ramble.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22502 0 0}{f 5 21 1 100}Anyway, this taiyaki is {f 0 1 2}delicious even if you chill it in the fridge at home{f 0 1 27}... So try it out![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 0 1 2}Lukewarm Taiyaki{f 0 1 27} can now be bought at the school store.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22505 0 0}{f 5 21 1 100}Oh, sorry, I'm talking too much, aren't I? So, what would you like to buy?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22506 0 0}{f 5 21 1 100}Hm? You seem interested in what we've got for sale... You must be new or a transfer student![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}We don't have a huge variety of bread, but they're all very popular.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}I prepare a lot of food for the kids who are doing club activities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22506 0 0}{f 5 21 1 100}I heard that the captain of the boxing team got injured.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}Some girls were gossiping about it. That's a rough way to start the new school year.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22507 0 0}{f 5 21 1 100}Did you hear that one of the students fainted? Is she all right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}Hmmm... There's a lot of weird stuff going on out there. You should watch out too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22506 0 0}{f 5 21 1 100}I guess the heat doesn't bother you guys when you're wearing your summer clothes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}As for me... There's no air conditioner in here, and it gets so hot![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22506 0 0}{f 5 21 1 100}It's almost summer vacation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}The shop will be closed for the duration, so...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}That means I won't get paid. *sigh* This month is going to be tight...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22506 0 0}{f 5 21 1 100}I see that Apathy Syndrome stuff on the news a lot these days. It seems like there's more of them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}How worrying... You should be careful about that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}If it spreads too wide and the school shuts down, I'd have to look for another job...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22507 0 0}{f 5 21 1 100}The culture festival got canceled... Well, with how bad that typhoon was, I'm not surprised.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}My house got soaked in that typhoon... It was a huge hassle![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22507 0 0}{f 5 21 1 100}It's sad when any student dies, no matter what they were like.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}I feel like I lost one of my own children...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22506 0 0}{f 5 21 1 100}It's cooling down outside lately.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}There's no heater here, so it gets freezing cold in the winter.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22506 0 0}{f 5 21 1 100}Are you here to buy some taiyaki, too?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}Sorry, but we're all sold out on those.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}I stock up on them every now and then...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 100}Seems like they've {f 0 1 2}been trending on some website{f 0 1 27}, and that's why they sell out so quickly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's no taiyaki on sale...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should try to gather more information[n]on the {f 0 1 2}website{f 0 1 27} it's trending on...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22502 0 0}{f 5 21 1 100}I don't have any taiyaki, but go ahead and look at what else there is.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 22504 0 0}{f 5 21 1 100}Sorry, but we're sold out of everything. Come by again.[n]{f 1 1}
